compiled_state.title: Update CLAUDE.md, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md and docs for @playwright/cli
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Description
Update existing project documentation to reflect @playwright/cli migration:
1. CLAUDE.md — update Playwright references to describe CLI-based automation
2. CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md — update E2E test command examples and Playwright config
3. INSTALL.md — update setup instructions for CLI instead of MCP
4. Any other docs referencing Playwright MCP as active interface

Do NOT create new documentation files (that's story 06fa-3ba5). Only update existing files.

## File Impact
- CLAUDE.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md (EDIT)
- plugins/dso/docs/INSTALL.md (EDIT)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] No Playwright MCP as active interface in CLAUDE.md
  Verify: ! grep -qi "playwright.*mcp.*tool\|browser_run_code\|browser_snapshot" CLAUDE.md
- [ ] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE uses CLI examples
  Verify: ! grep -q "browser_" plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
- [ ] All RED tests pass
  Verify: bash tests/docs/test-playwright-doc-refs.sh 2>&1 | grep -v "FAIL" | grep -q "PASS"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
